title: Reminder: If you still hold USDC bridged via deBridge, please bridge it out as soon as possible
message_html: Reminder: If you still hold USDC bridged via deBridge, please bridge it out as soon as possible ...
snippet: Zilliqa (@zilliqa): 📢 Reminder: If you still hold USDC bridged via deBridge, please bridge it out as soon as possible. deBridge will sunset on 31 March, 2026 as announced in blog below. Learn more: https://blog.zilliqa.com/strengthening-stablecoin-infrastructure-on-zilliqa-introducing-zusdc-via-xbri
